predictedBugs: Mock endpoint patterns may not match actual frontend API routes (e.g., /api/v1/buscar vs **/api/buscar** pattern)
Stripe checkout redirect mock may not match actual frontend navigation pattern (window.location.href vs Stripe URL)
SSG pages like /planos may render server-side content that doesn't respond to mocked API routes on first load
edgeCases: Trial-expired->upgrade transition: mock may not perfectly simulate Stripe webhook + auth state change simultaneously
Empty pipeline state when mocking create/delete with no pre-existing items
SSE progress events mocked as instant responses but real SSE has timing-dependent UI rendering
